title: [MRE] Matter-Replication Engine
description: The ultimate techno-industrial Replication engine. Features flawless NBT sync, zero crashes, and fully hand-drawn 2D animated GUIs. As packed with value and easy to use as a real MRE! The future of Equivalent Exchange is here!
body:
![Mod Mechanic Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43714d035eddaab040f015bc45b9ed8101be397f_0.webp) # ⚙️ [MRE] Matter-Replication Engine > 💡 *As packed with value and easy to use as a real MRE! The future of Equivalent Exchange is here.* Tired of replication mods that corrupt your world, duplicate ghost items, or choke on complex NBT data from heavy tech modpacks? Stop compromising. **Matter-Replication Engine** is a next-generation Equivalent Exchange system built like a titanium vault. It completely rethinks the "Research & Replicate" mechanic, wrapping bulletproof backend architecture in a stunning, custom-drawn techno-industrial interface. --- ## 🛠️ Bulletproof Engineering * **Absolute NBT Preservation:** Powered by an advanced *Subset Matching* algorithm, this engine flawlessly reads, saves, and replicates items with complex dynamic NBT tags (batteries, customized weapons, fluid tanks). * **0% Crash Guarantee:** Optimized server-client packet synchronization ensures zero Shift-Click duplication exploits and zero ghost items in your crafting grid. It is built to survive massive 1.12.2 tech packs seamlessly. * **Smart Auto-Research:** Optionally automatically consumes and researches items as you craft them, eliminating endless GUI clicking. ## 🎨 Next-Gen Cyber-Punk Interface This isn't just a menu; it's a mechanical experience.Every button, slot, and border is meticulously designed to fit a dark, industrial factory aesthetic with striking neon purple accents and mechanical piston logic. * **Pixel Precision:** Fully hand-drawn 2D pixel art. * **Dynamic Visuals:** Smooth animated progress bars with dynamic color shifting and actual 2D physics elements right in your GUI! --- ## 🔍 Detailed Features & Configuration
📦 Click to expand: How the Replication Works 1. **Sacrifice:** Place your hard-earned resources into the engine's extraction slot. 2. **Deconstruction:** The engine analyzes the item structure and completely consumes it (fully configurable via `consumeItems = true` by default to preserve server economy). 3. **Replication:** Once the research progress reaches 100%, you unlock infinite replication for that specific item type.
⚙️ Click to expand: Modpack & Compatibility Tech Specs * **100% Compatible with:** *HBM's Nuclear Tech*, *Techguns*, and any mods utilizing deep NBT energy/damage tracking. * **Anti-Conflict Layout:** Includes adjustable X/Y offsets for GUI buttons in the config file to prevent overlapping with inventory sorters or JEI overlays.
❓ Click to expand: Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ) * **Q: Is it compatible with similar mods (like ProjectE)?** * **A:** Yes, it works perfectly fine alongside other replication mods like *ProjectE*, but I cannot guarantee game balance if you mix them! The configuration file is currently in early development, so full customization options aren't completely implemented yet. * **Q: What about GUI customization?** * **A:** A meta-progression system integrated directly into the main menu's progress bar is planned, but for now, it's only on the drawing board. In future updates, it will allow you to unlock different UI styles and custom color configurations. For now, only the liquid inside the progress bar dynamically shifts colors! * **Q: Is it safe for multiplayer servers?** * **A:** I guarantee you won't find this mod causing a single crash in your server logs. If it ever does, you have my official permission to hit me with a slipper—though I highly doubt it'll ever come to that! *(Note: This guarantee applies strictly to official **Release** versions; experimental or beta builds outside of main releases are a different story).*
--- ### 🏷️ Tags & Metadata `ProjectE` • `Equivalent Exchange` • `EE2` • `Research` • `Legal Dupe` • `Replication` `Progression` • `Terraria Journey Mode` • `Industrial` • `Utility`
